top_signals.title: Freight Market: July Doldrums or Goldilocks Zone?
top_signals.summary:
SummaryView Transcript Is the freight market in a ‘Goldilocks scenario’? July may be seasonally slow, but underlying conditions suggest a significant shift towards quality and contracted rates. We break down why load boards are losing market share and what this means for future rate increases. Summary unavailable.

The post Freight Market: July Doldrums or Goldilocks Zone? appeared first on FreightWaves.

top_signals.title: Private vs. Public: How ODW Logistics Navigates Growth & Strategy
top_signals.summary:
SummaryView Transcript Paul Boothe, Chief Commercial Officer at ODW Logistics, joins FreightWaves Today to dissect the nuances of the ArcBest-Molo acquisition, the impact of cultural integration, and the evolving dynamics of the logistics market. Boothe shares insights from his decades-long career, covering the automotive sector’s pivot post-COVID, the ‘supercycle’ in freight, and the critical role […]

top_signals.title: Activities of U.S. Affiliates of Foreign Multinational Enterprises, 2024
top_signals.summary: Majority-owned U.S. affiliates of foreign multinational enterprises employed 8.57 million workers in the United States in 2024, a 0.2 percent increase from 8.56 million workers in 2023, according to statistics on U.S. affiliate operations and finances released today by the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis.
